---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

A minimal, runnable code snippet that reproduces the problem:

```python
from derivflow import price_european_option
# ...
```

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including the full traceback if an error was raised.

## Environment

- DERIVFLOW-FINANCE version: (e.g. `0.2.0`)
- Python version: (e.g. `3.11`)
- Operating system: (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- Installed via: (PyPI, source, editable)

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (data sources, network access,
optional extras installed, etc.).
